completed_stories.title: Wire Macro Regime into Conviction Score
Expand Ticker Universe with Sector ETFs
Open Trade Age Indicator and Quick-Close UI
Add Sector Field to Ticker Model
Pre-Flight Variance Check in Weight Optimiser
Signal Health Endpoint + AV Warning Banner
Seed T10Y2Y Historical Data
completed_stories.notes: FredClient.get_series_range() added. scripts/seed_t10y2y.py created and run: 812 T10Y2Y rows seeded (2023-01-01 to 2026-04-05). H12 unblocked. 8/8 tests passing.

completed_stories.title: FRED News/Sentiment Fallback
completed_stories.notes: FredSentimentService (UMCSENT 50% + VIXCLS 30% + USEPUINDXD 20%) created. Wired into swing.py with AV-unavailable guard. Scheduler extended with UMCSENT + USEPUINDXD. 9/9 tests passing. Note: historical UMCSENT/USEPUINDXD not yet seeded — scheduler will start daily ingestion from today.

completed_stories.title: Conviction Threshold Filter (min_conviction param)
completed_stories.notes: GET /api/scores/universe/{u}?min_conviction=N and GET /api/scores?min_conviction=N added. Optional[int] ge=0 le=100. None conviction treated as 0. 6/6 tests passing.

completed_stories.title: Regime-conditional leaderboard guidance overlay
completed_stories.notes: GET /api/macro/regime/guidance endpoint added (1h cache, T10Y2Y-based win rates per bucket). RegimeGuidance TS types + macroAPI.getGuidance() added. Leaderboard banner upgraded to show data-driven note + win rate table. BEAR guidance corrected to <40. 4/4 tests passing.

completed_stories.title: Seed UMCSENT + USEPUINDXD historical data
completed_stories.notes: Pre-done from Sprint 11 agent work. seed_fred_series.py + test_seed_fred_series.py already in place. Dry-run confirmed: UMCSENT 38 rows, USEPUINDXD 1188 rows, 0 new inserts needed.

completed_stories.title: Fix ×100 display bug in regime_stratified_analysis.py
completed_stories.notes: Pre-done. Display was already correct (avg return shows 1.86%, not 186%). test_regime_stratified_analysis.py guards against regression.

completed_stories.title: H10 backfill bias investigation script
completed_stories.notes: scripts/h10_backfill_bias_analysis.py created. All 2,714 trades classified as backfill. BEAR <40 median hold=10d, 0 trades with hold ≤ 3d. Verdict: INSUFFICIENT FORWARD DATA. No look-ahead bias detected in backfill structure.

sprint_notes: Sprint 12 complete. S34: regime guidance endpoint live + Leaderboard banner upgraded with data-driven win rates. S35/S36: pre-done from Sprint 11 agent work. S37: H10 bias script — INSUFFICIENT FORWARD DATA (all 2,714 trades back-fill, median hold=10d, no look-ahead bias). 197/197 tests. Next: S38 (fix TS errors), S39 (BEAR regime entry warning), S40 (H11 exit logic), S41 (H3 weight re-opt).
